channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vancouver Goldeneyes defeat Seattle Torrent 4-1 to stay in playoff contention
item.description: The Vancouver Goldeneyes kept their faint playoff hopes alive with a decisive 4-1 victory over the Seattle Torrent in a matchup between two expansion teams. Hannah Miller scored early in the second pe...

item.title: Queensland Translink head resigns amid departmental reshuffle and rail network scrutiny
item.description: Deborah Hume, who was appointed as deputy director-general of Queensland’s Translink division in 2025 after being recruited from New Zealand, has resigned from her role citing family reasons. Hume, wh...

item.title: RTI Intervenes to Remove 26 Overloaded Schoolchildren from Unsafe Minibus Taxi
item.description: On Monday, the No Nonsense Road Traffic Intervention Team (RTI) in Park Rynie intervened to protect the lives of 26 schoolchildren who were dangerously crammed into a minibus taxi designed for only 14...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh closely monitoring two candidates in Kerala and Tamil Nadu for Rajya Sabha election
item.description: The Rajya Sabha elections in India have drawn keen attention from Madhya Pradesh due to the political significance of two candidates contesting in Kerala and Tamil Nadu. Though the elections are geogr...

item.title: Kate Garraway Finds New Happiness with Journalist Liam Halligan After Losing Her Husband Derek Draper
item.description: Television presenter Kate Garraway, known for her work on Good Morning Britain and Smooth Radio, appears to have found love again two years after the death of her husband, Derek Draper. Draper passed ...

item.title: Iran’s Oil Exports and China’s Role Challenge Trump’s Hormuz Blockade
item.description: The article discusses how Iran appears to be gaining the upper hand in the ongoing oil standoff spurred by former US President Donald Trump’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Javier Blas argues that ...

item.title: Nigeria: Petrol Imports Surge Amidst Refinery Challenges and Price Hikes
item.description: Ahahn! Things dey happen for the oil market for Nigeria. According to the Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority (NMDPRA), petrol imports don jump up by almost 96.6 per cent!...

item.title: AA and BSM instructed to refund learner drivers due to misleading pricing practices
item.description: The UK’s Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has taken action against two major driving schools, AA and BSM, ordering them to refund approximately 80,000 learner drivers following the use of 'drip...

item.title: Jeffrey Sachs Advocates U.S. Support for Middle East Peace Through Recognition of Palestinian Statehood
item.description: In this article, Jeffrey Sachs argues that lasting peace in the Middle East requires the United States to stop its unconditional support for Israel’s military actions and to encourage Israel to respec...

item.title: 70-Year-Old Patient Dies After Surgeon Removes Wrong Organ During Planned Spleen Operation
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded in Florida when a 70-year-old man named William Bryan passed away following a routine hospital visit that escalated into a fatal medical error. Bryan had gone to Ascension S...

item.title: Delhi faces temporary water supply disruption due to emergency maintenance at Chandrawal plant
item.description: The Delhi Jal Board (DJB) has announced that several parts of Central and North Delhi will experience low water pressure or temporary disruption in supply on April 15 and 16 due to emergency maintenan...

item.title: Kenya adjusts fuel prices upward following rise in global oil and shipping costs
item.description: Fuel prices in Kenya have reached unprecedented levels following a sharp increase in global oil prices and higher shipping costs. The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (Epra) announced that fr...

item.title: The serious consequences of longer and hotter summers caused by climate change
item.description: This First Dog on the Moon cartoon commentary from The Guardian uses a humorous yet darkly ironic tone to highlight the dangers of increasingly long summers—a direct result of accelerating climate cha...

item.title: WhatsApp Web to get new chat themes for better customisation
item.description: WhatsApp dey plan serious update for their web platform. The main thing wey dey happen be say dem go bring plenty chat themes wey go allow people fit change how their chat interface dey look. Right no...

item.title: PM Shehbaz embarks on official visits to strengthen ties with Saudi Arabia, Turkiye, and Qatar
item.description: On 15th April 2026, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif departed Islamabad for Jeddah, beginning a series of official visits to Saudi Arabia, Turkiye, and Qatar. Accompanied by a high-level delegation inclu...

item.title: EFF leader Julius Malema outlines legal strategy ahead of sentencing
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema has reassured his supporters that he is ready to fight any custodial sentence handed down in the East London magistrates court. Convicted in October on five firearm-related ch...

item.title: Balancing Parents' Guidance and Students’ Career Choices in Kenya
item.description: In Kenya, choosing a university course often sparks tension between parental expectations and students’ personal passions. The story of John Thumbi Maina illustrates this struggle: after his KCSE resu...

item.title: Ruto intervenes to maintain unity amid ODM internal divisions
item.description: President William Ruto has stepped in to calm rising political tensions between his United Democratic Alliance (UDA) and the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). Amid growing mistrust and accusations tha...

item.title: Heirs Insurance and United Capital Host Wellness and Financial Empowerment Event for Women
item.description: Heirs Insurance Group, wey dey grow fast for Nigeria, and United Capital Plc, one big Pan-African investment and financial service group, don host one special event called Yoga and Money Meet Up for L...

item.title: The Best of the Bee Gees: A Vibrant Tribute Concert at Newport Performing Arts Theater
item.description: The Best of the Bee Gees tribute show at the Newport Performing Arts Theater brought an evening of nostalgia and vibrant energy, delighting fans of the legendary disco group. The concert celebrated th...
